tech.title: The AI Hype Index: AI gets booed in graduation season
tech.summary: It is one thing to say AI will change the world. It is another to expect the class of 2026 to applaud it. In fact, when former Google CEO Eric Schmidt told University of Arizona graduates that their task is to help shape AI, he was met with a resounding chorus of boos. “I can…

tech.title: The Download: keeping up with AI, and the future of IVF
